hibernate-mapping.query: Select tppps From com.intuit.sbd.payroll.psp.domain.ThirdParty401kPaycheckPendingState as tppps inner join fetch tppps.ThirdParty401kPaycheck as tpp inner join fetch tpp.Paycheck as pc inner join fetch pc.PayrollRun as pr inner join fetch pr.Company as c inner join c.CompanyServiceSet as cs inner join fetch pc.SourceEmployee Where tppps.StateCd = 'InvalidEmployeeData' and tppps.InitiationDate >= cs.ServiceStartDate and tppps.InitiationDate between :initiationDateStart and :initiationDateEnd and cs.StatusCd != 'Terminated' and cs.StatusCd != 'Cancelled' order by c.SourceCompanyId, pr.PaycheckDate asc
